articles.title: 4 takeaways from the U.S. loss against Türkiye in the World Cup
articles.description:
A back-and-forth group stage finale had an intensity that belied the game's actual importance.

The post 4 takeaways from the U.S. loss against Türkiye in the World Cup appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: U.S. men's soccer team lost 3-2 to Türkiye in World Cup group stage.
Boston's local soccer fans expressed disappointment over the team's performance on June 26.
The loss affects U.S. chances for advancement, impacting local viewing events planned for future matches.

articles.title: Pochettino annoyed by perceived disappointment after US finishes group play with 3-2 loss to Turkey
articles.description:
